original_message:
Power Update 
Emergency power interruption today December 19, 2025 from 9am to 4pm.
Activity: Remove guy wire & tap guy in Brgy. 03, San Policarpo 
( Requested by Municipal Vice Mayor Nicart) 
Affected Area/s: San Policarpo Poblacion ( Brgy. 01- 05) 
We're sorry for the inconvenience. We are working as quickly and safely as possible to get lights back on. 
Esamelco Burak contact numbers
0969-4898893- Line Maintenance
0969-4898861- Esamelco Burak Office
extracted_date: Emergency power interruption today December 19, 2025 from 9am to 4pm.

ESAMELCO EMERGENCY POWER INTERRUPTION!!📢
WHEN: 
🗓JANUARY 7, 2026 - TODAY
🕛10:30 AM - 12:00 NN - ESSU Compound
🕛10:00 AM - 3:00 PM - Brgy. 2, Balangkayan
ACTIVITIES:
✅Removal of old wood pole and distribution transformer at the ESSU Main compound as requested by ESSU Management.
✅Vegetation line clearing of primary and secondary line as requested by the Balangkayan LGU.
AFFECTED AREAS:
📍ESSU Main Campus, Brgy. Maypangdan, Borongan City
📍Brgy. 2, Balangakayan, Eastern Samar
PAHINUMDUM:
Ine nga trabahuon in pwede matapos hin temprano ngan pwede maibalik iton kuryente antis pa iton iya naka-schedule nga oras. Sanglit, para maiwasan iton disgrasya, itrato nga pirme mayda kuryente an mga linya! Damo nga salamat!
